description.p: Thanks to Nevod Dorsk, you have received some training in the ways of the wizard, granting you these benefits:

ul.li: You can cast ritual spells as rituals.
You can understand wizard spells and cast them from spell scrolls.

You can attempt to learn additional spells from the sorcerer or wizard spell list. To do so, you must first acquire the spell from a scroll or spellbook. You must then study the spell for 4 hours per level of the spell, and then make an Arcana check with DC 10 + the spell's level.
On a success, you learn the spell. On a failure, you must study the spell for a further hour per level of the spell before repeating the check. The hours need not be consecutive.
You can learn a number of spells in this manner equal to your Intelligence modifier + your proficiency bonus, multiplied by 2.
These spells count as sorcerer spells for you.

sheet.description: You gain the following benefits: • You can cast ritual spells as rituals. • You can understand wizard spells and cast them from spell scrolls. • You can learn up to {{wizardry training:spells known}} spells from the sorcerer or wizard spell list. This equals (Intelligence Modifier + Proficiency Bonus) x 2. • To learn a spell, acquire it from a scroll or spellbook, study it for 4 hours per spell level, then make an Arcana check with DC 10 + the spell's level. • On a failure, study for 1 additional hour per spell level before trying again. The hours need not be consecutive. • These spells count as sorcerer spells for you.

description.p: You have learned ways to infuse your sight with magic, which can be used in the following ways:

ul.li: Gain a +10 bonus on a sight-based ability check, usually Perception or Investigation.
Gain 10 feet of Manasight for 1 minute, allowing you to see magic, like the detect magic spell.
Gain 60 feet of Enhanced Darkvision for 1 hour, allowing you to see clearly in darkness, or in pitch black as though it were dim light.

description.p: You can safely use this talent a number of times between long rests equal to your proficiency bonus.
You may, if you wish, use this talent one additional time between long rests, but there may be consequences.

sheet.description: Use one option: gain +10 on a sight-based ability check, gain 10 ft. Manasight for 1 minute, or gain 60 ft. Enhanced Darkvision for 1 hour. You may use this one additional time beyond the safe limit, but there may be consequences.
